component.name: bg-be-gone
component.summary: Remove image backgrounds and segment objects locally

description.p: A local image background remover with a GTK interface. It runs BiRefNet and other rembg models through ONNX Runtime, with GPU acceleration on NVIDIA and AMD and a CPU fallback. Images are processed on your machine.

It also segments individual objects with Meta's Segment Anything (SAM 2.1), running as a separate pass through ONNX Runtime. The right model is picked automatically from your GPU and VRAM, stepping down on failure, and can run without the background-removal dependency.

ul.li: Object segmentation: segment everything into pickable layers, or click to select
Automatic SAM model selection by GPU/VRAM, with a cancel/break control
Interactive panels: zoom, pan, rotate, flip
Subject presets and an advanced model picker

description.p: Adds object segmentation with Segment Anything (SAM 2.1), a new interactive Segment page, VRAM-aware model selection, and an optional segmentation-only build.
